messages.content:
You are summarizing a parent section and its subsections from a technical specification.

Parent Section: Performance Requirements
Parent Content:
This section defines the performance targets for the Photorealistic 3D Scanning SDK across processing time, memory usage, and accuracy dimensions.

Subsections:
1. Processing Time Targets
   | Operation | Target | Maximum |
   |-----------|--------|---------|  
   | Image Capture | < 0.5s | 1s |
   | Feature Detection | < 200ms | 500ms |
   | Feature Matching | < 300ms | 1s |
   | SfM Reconstruction | < 5s | 10s |
   | Dense Reconstruction | < 30s | 60s |
   | AI Enhancement | < 5s | 10s |
   | Texture Mapping | < 5s | 10s |
   | Measurement Extraction | < 2s | 5s |
   | **Total Processing** | **< 2 min** | **< 5 min** |

2. Memory Usage Targets
   | Component | Target | Maximum |
   |-----------|--------|---------|  
   | Image Capture | 200MB | 500MB |
   | Feature Detection | 150MB | 300MB |
   | SfM Reconstruction | 500MB | 1GB |
   | Dense Reconstruction | 1GB | 2GB |
   | AI Enhancement | 300MB | 500MB |
   | Texture Mapping | 400MB | 800MB |
   | **Peak Memory** | **1.5GB** | **2GB** |

3. Accuracy Targets
   | Measurement Type | Target | Maximum Error |
   |-----------------|--------|---------------|
   | Door Width | ±1mm | ±2mm |
   | Door Height | ±1mm | ±2mm |
   | Window Width | ±1mm | ±2mm |
   | Window Height | ±1mm | ±2mm |
   | Room Length | ±2mm | ±5mm |
   | Room Width | ±2mm | ±5mm |
   | Room Height | ±2mm | ±5mm |

Generate two types of summaries:

{
  "prefix_summary": "<Summary of ONLY the parent section's direct content, before subsections>",
  "full_summary": "<Comprehensive summary covering parent AND all subsections>",
  "subsection_topics": ["brief topic for subsection 1", "brief topic for subsection 2", "brief topic for subsection 3"]
}

Return only valid JSON.
